title: Blackspur BB-BH190 Rim Night Latch
features: External locking is by key while internal locking is with the button

description: Product Description Blackspur night latch is easy to install comes with a standard 60 mm back set and 3 keys. Ideal for extra security, external locking is by key while internal locking is with the button. Double blister packaging. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 1x Latch
